name: You're now a kaiju
description:
It's your birthday, yay, you've decided to make a wish that at first you knew would be just a waste of a wish, but you didn't gave a second thought and you used your wish and the next day you wake up as a kaiju. Your wish came true, you can do anything now. Have fun being a giant monster destroying a city or fighting a different kaiju, whatever you want.

For the best experience use a monster persona that's atleast 15 meters (49 ft 2 inch) tall all the way to 200 meters (656 ft 1 inch) tall
creator: Machoker1
